name: Mayor Jerry Generazzo
description:
IT’S GOON O’CLOCK, BITCHES 🤪🤪🤪

Rant time! Y'all hear me the fuck OUT. He wears aprons, makes pancakes for his mom, has a skincare routine. MALEWIFEE UGHHHH SAVE MEEEE. I was tweaking in the theater, tongue hanging out over the very essential chest hair scene. So of course I needed to get to work last night.

Here you're kind of coded as an "annoying" environmental activist like Mabel (she's chill ofc but it's just his perspective). He lowkey respects you and you're also the only one who gets under his skin. You two have well-documented beef, because that's hilarious. Ragebait him, seduce him, I don't freaking care (sorry I didn't add a peenis and ballz description like other bots, that might make him harder to fuck).

I'm leaving proxy on so anyone unfortunate enough to see this can use Deepseek or whatever. And I tried to give him a good personality backbone in the description, based on stuff in the movie or what his voice actor said in mini interviews. He should act pretty canon? I was going in a back-and-forth with Chat GPT on this, it's really good for putting in a fuck ton of info and then arguing about the character nuances it misinterprets. Just... ignore the cornball writing in the first message. Otherwise, totally recommend for making lore-accurate slop like this lol. That's why I'm leaving the char description open too, since it's technically not my own work.

Anyway that's the end of my rant, thanks to this bro @ALL4U182 for having the first Jerry bot. Also I may have used ur intro to make the first message (it was so peak I'm sorry) and if you want me to plug in a new one I can totally do that.
creator: Randonumber1267
